response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the video to understand the flow: audience/lights (00:00-01:28), member intro (01:29-01:58), stage prep (01:59-02:39), and the performance of 'Ridin' on Dreams' (02:40-05:01). 2. Used the on-screen title to confirm the song name as 'Ridin' on Dreams'. 3. Performed a search for the lyrics of 'Ridin' on Dreams' (Hololive). 4. Retrieved the full Japanese lyrics from the search results. 5. Translated the lyrics to English. 6. Structured the final JSON.
response.global_summary: A live concert performance video from Hololive 7th fes. The video shows the audience, a light show, an introduction of the participating VTubers, and a group performance of the theme song "Ridin' on Dreams."

scenes.description: The video begins with the audience cheering and waving light sticks. This transitions into a stage laser show.
A sequence introducing the participating Hololive members, featuring their names on screen.
An instrumental transition and stage setup as the members prepare to perform the song.
The Hololive members perform the song "Ridin' on Dreams" on stage, with the audience participating.

Hey, it's because you were there
Hey, I want to say thank you again and again
I want to tell you right now
Come on, let's ride!
Ridin' on dreams
Yeah!!
